seo.title: Writing · Rosso Consulting
seo.description: Essays on hospitality distribution, AI deployment, channel economics, and the operator-buyer interface. Written by Marco Rosso.

hero.headline:
Notes from
the operator's seat
hero.sub: Essays on hospitality distribution, AI deployment, channel economics, and the operator-buyer interface. Written for revenue managers, GMs, founders, and investors who want the operator-side view of where the industry is actually going.

footerNote.main: New essays are published roughly monthly. Topics follow what is actually on the operator's desk that month — distribution shifts, vendor consolidation, AI deployment, channel economics, commercial team design.
footerNote.linkedinLead: Original versions of several essays are also published on

cta.label: Want to discuss any of this
cta.headline: Let's talk
cta.sub: These essays come out of real engagements. Reach out if any of them describe a situation you are in.
